title: Ironclad Drift Detectors
description: Catalog of 19 drift detectors with self-describing schema. See iron-law.md stage_1.3 Drift for usage.

rationale.count_is_load_bearing: 19 detectors balanced across 4 axes: spec_vs_code(6) + code_vs_test(6) + spec_vs_test(4) + environment(3). Every Trinity boundary covered; environmental concerns separated.
rationale.determinism_guarantee: 18/19 detectors are determinism: deterministic (LLM-free; hash/diff/regex/graph/timestamp/numeric); 1 is semantic (CONVENTION_DRIFT, pattern/AST). No detector is llm_assisted — the catalog is structurally LLM-free.

duplicates_intentional.HARDCODED_SECRET_vs_iron_law_stage_1.6: intentional double net — stage_1.6 is a dedicated gate, detector #11 is the integrated drift category. Same check, two entry points (defense in depth).
duplicates_intentional.UNTESTED_AC_vs_MISSING_TESTS: different granularity — UNTESTED_AC is AC-level (each AC needs a test), MISSING_TESTS is code-level (each changed module needs a test).
duplicates_intentional.STALE_EVIDENCE_vs_EVIDENCE_MISMATCH: different dimension — STALE is time-based (spec changed after), MISMATCH is hash-based (re-run differs).
duplicates_intentional.STALE_SPECIFICATION_vs_UNMAPPED_ARTIFACT: opposite directions — spec orphan (no code/test) vs code orphan (no spec).

absent_detectors_and_placement.Dependency Vulnerability: out of MVP — deferred to v0.1.x (security-focused minor).
absent_detectors_and_placement.Documentation Drift: subsumed by AC_DRIFT (AC is primary spec doc) + META_INTEGRITY (sigil-cited facts).
absent_detectors_and_placement.Type Safety Erosion (any/@ts-ignore): subsumed by iron-law stage_1.1 Type + stage_1.2 Lint.
absent_detectors_and_placement.License Compliance: out of MVP — project-level concern, not standard scope.

Severity.description: error = blocks complete() · warn = notify only

ComparisonAxis.description: Which two SSoT pieces are compared, or environmental integrity

DetectorStatus.description: implemented = active in reference impl · renaming = exists under legacy name · planned = not yet implemented

Determinism.description: deterministic = LLM-free by construction (hash, diff, regex, graph, timestamp, numeric) · semantic = pattern/AST/convention rules (no LLM, but goes beyond pure syntax) · llm_assisted = decision requires LLM judgment (none currently)

industry_alias.description: Equivalent term in industry literature (when applicable)

legacy_kind.description: DriftKind name in harness-boot reference impl

notes.description: Disambiguation, scope clarification, or implementation note

detectors.name: Unmapped Artifact
detectors.description: Tracked source file (.ts, .py, .go, etc.) not declared in any feature module
detectors.pass_criteria: every tracked source artifact maps to a feature module
detectors.remediation: sync --reverse (update spec) OR remove orphan artifact

detectors.name: Missing Implementation
detectors.description: Spec declares feature done but source artifact absent

detectors.name: AC Drift
detectors.description: Acceptance criterion changed but related logic not updated
detectors.pass_criteria: AC content hash matches anchor reference

detectors.name: Tech-Stack Mismatch
detectors.description: Library not in declared stack used
detectors.remediation: add to spec stack OR remove dependency

detectors.name: Architecture Violation
detectors.description: Layer or dependency direction rule violated
detectors.pass_criteria: no edge violates declared layer order

detectors.name: Convention/Philosophy Drift
detectors.description: Code style/pattern violation beyond syntactic lint (naming idioms, architectural patterns, philosophy)
detectors.remediation: manual fix OR update convention rule
detectors.notes: Differs from iron-law stage_1.2 Lint: this is semantic (e.g., naming patterns), Lint is syntactic.

detectors.name: Missing Tests
detectors.description: Logic changed but no test added
detectors.pass_criteria: every changed logic file has a corresponding test

detectors.name: Stale Tests
detectors.pass_criteria: tests touched within window after impl change

detectors.name: Coverage Drop
detectors.remediation: add tests OR adjust threshold with rationale

detectors.name: Evidence Mismatch
detectors.description: Recorded evidence hash differs from current run hash (evidence stale at runtime)

detectors.name: Hardcoded Secret
detectors.notes: Intentional double net with iron-law stage_1.6 Secret — same check, two entry points (defense in depth).

detectors.name: Performance Drift
detectors.description: Measured perf exceeds budget or regressed
detectors.pass_criteria: within budget AND no significant regression

detectors.name: Untested AC
detectors.description: AC has no corresponding test case
detectors.pass_criteria: every AC ID referenced by at least one test

detectors.name: Status Drift
detectors.description: Feature status disagrees with integration evidence
detectors.pass_criteria: done feature has integration anchor wired

detectors.name: Stale Evidence
detectors.pass_criteria: evidence newer than relevant spec change

detectors.name: Stale Specification
detectors.description: Spec entry no longer referenced by code or tests
detectors.pass_criteria: every done feature referenced in src/
detectors.notes: Opposite direction to UNMAPPED_ARTIFACT (spec orphan vs code orphan).

detectors.name: Harness Integrity
detectors.description: Harness config conflicts with runtime environment

detectors.name: Meta-Integrity
detectors.description: Meta-doc sigil claims diverge from cited source-of-truth
